title: Arbitrary WASM type confusion due to module confusion in wasm-to-js tier-up
description_snippet:
## VULNERABILITY DETAILS 
The poc trigger here[0]: Debug check failed: IsSubtypeOf(value.type(), global.type, module_).  

It should be a variant case of CVE-2024-10230[1][2], which has been used in v8ctf M129, I don't know how to exp temporarily, but it should be exploitable.  

I will try to analy
